scripts.build: esbuild src/portfolio/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/portfolio/handler.mjs --external:@aws-sdk/* && cp src/portfolio/schema.graphql dist/portfolio/schema.graphql && esbuild src/games/imposter/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/games/imposter/handler.mjs --external:@aws-sdk/* && cp src/games/imposter/schema.graphql dist/games/imposter/schema.graphql && esbuild src/pantry/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/pantry/handler.mjs --external:@aws-sdk/* && cp src/pantry/schema.graphql dist/pantry/schema.graphql && esbuild src/pantry/digest-handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/pantry/digest-handler.mjs --external:@aws-sdk/* && esbuild src/pantry/price-check-handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/pantry/price-check-handler.mjs --external:@aws-sdk/*
